target: Top and bottom shell diameter, height, mass, and 1.0 mm thickness map recorded before forming
method: Measure diameter/height with tape or calipers, mass with scale, and thickness on a marked grid
next_action: Create a shell inspection log before any forming or tone-field work

target: Material and heat/surface treatment path is documented per shell
method: Collect supplier certificate or process notes for nitrided DC04, stainless, or alternate shell stock
next_action: Attach supplier/process evidence and branch stainless/nitrided paths separately

target: Ding and eight surrounding field marks are removable templates only
method: Lay out on removable film/template and photograph before hammering; do not scribe final cut/tuned geometry
next_action: Have a tuner or forming lead approve template placement before field forming

target: Each tuned field has fundamental, octave, and compound-fifth partial captures
method: Record FFT/strobe captures for Ding and fields A3 through A4 at fixed mic distance and strike force; store rows in measured-partial-strike-log.csv
next_action: Populate measured fundamentals/partials before claiming tuning success

target: Cross-talk matrix is recorded after rough tuning and after final settle
method: Strike every field and record neighbor response in dB relative to struck fundamental; duplicate cross-talk matrix rows in measured-partial-strike-log.csv
next_action: Add strike matrix and retune fields that exceed the cross-talk gate

target: Actual Gu response is measured after shell closure
method: Measure Gu/cavity response with tap, air excitation, or spectrum capture after rim bonding
next_action: Update Gu model with measured shell volume, port diameter, lip shape, and response

target: Forming, work-hardening, and heat-treatment changes are logged by operation
method: Log hammering passes, heat/surface treatment, rest times, and recheck tuning after each major operation
next_action: Create a build log before treating field geometry as repeatable

target: Human handpan tuner and metal-forming lead review the packet and first measurements
method: Review layout, forming sequence, material/process path, Gu edge safety, and public claims
next_action: Keep the repo in research/private-review posture until signoff is recorded
